changelog: Live view fixes: smooth stream, persistent labels, 15s refresh while watching. Fewer false alerts, mobile navbar fixed.
changes: Live View: Smooth stream -- labels drawn on every frame, no more frozen frames
Live View: YOLO refreshes every 15s while live view is open (120s when closed)
Live View: Persistent label cache keeps objects visible between YOLO passes
AI: Confidence threshold raised to 80% -- significantly fewer false alerts
AI: Night/IR threshold raised to 88% for extra accuracy in low light
AI: Alert requires 3 consecutive confirmed frames (was 2) before triggering
Mobile: Hamburger menu button fully visible and easy to tap on all phones
Mobile: Navbar layout fixed for iPhone -- logo, title and buttons always on screen
Fix: bullet separator in Events page was showing as • literal text
